recap: Fragment 1 covered launch week: self-service account block/reactivate + email-OTP web login, a nasty unawaited-insert bug that instantly logged users out, PostHog analytics rollout across the API/frontend/6 bots, and the week's biggest scare - milestone transactions finalizing the whole project on one phase's release, fixed with a proper per-phase completion + dispute-escrow rebuild that then had to be ported for parity across WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, and Apple Business. Closed out with a cross-bot 'resume TXN-XXXXXX' command and real payment provider logos. Next chapter: an admin dashboard rebuild.
